nodes.name: App · send eng email
nodes.notes: Called by the AI Console 'Send via n8n' button. Payload: { requestId, ref, to, subject, body }. Optional: add Header Auth on this node checking x-webhook-secret against N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

nodes.name: Send engineering email
nodes.notes: Sender = the SAME Google account as the expense Sheet export (amraoui.cabinet.test@gmail.com). The Sheet uses a Google SHEETS OAuth2 credential, which a Gmail node cannot use (different type/scope), so add a GMAIL OAuth2 credential authorized as that same amraoui.cabinet.test@gmail.com account and select it here. The requester address, subject and body come from the console (staff-reviewed). For SMTP instead, swap this for a 'Send Email' node.
